name: image_ernie_image_turbo
description: Baidu ERNIE-Image-Turbo 8B — distilled (DMD + RL) fast variant of ERNIE-Image, generates in just 8 Euler steps at CFG 1 with negative conditioning zeroed out. Uses the Mistral-3 3B text encoder and the Flux.2 VAE. Local-only — requires diffusion_models/ernie-image-turbo.safetensors, text_encoders/ministral-3-3b.safetensors, and vae/flux2-vae.safetensors in your ComfyUI models directory (see https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ERNIE-Image). Supported native resolutions: 1024x1024, 1264x848, 848x1264, 1376x768, 768x1376, 1200x896, 896x1200.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the image to generate. ERNIE-Image excels at precise text rendering and structured layouts (infographics, posters, multi-language signage).
